---
title: "Tools & Data"
---

This is where the platform earns its keep — the interactive, data-driven pieces
that a simple page builder can't do. Planned tools:

- **Live climate charts** — atmospheric CO₂, global temperature anomaly, pulled
  from open data so they stay current.
- **Diversity-index calculator** — enter species counts, get Simpson's index.
- **Ecological-footprint estimator** — a short questionnaire with a result.
- **Worked statistics examples** — with downloadable CSV data to try yourself.

When you're ready, these can be built with R or Python code blocks (Quarto runs
both), or with small interactive widgets. Ask and we'll build the first one together.
